title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
